top_signals.title: LH2 Shipping Orders Two More Liquid Hydrogen-Powered Bulk Carriers
top_signals.summary: LH2 Shipping has been awarded Enova support of NOK 344,3 million for the development and construction of two additional liquid hydrogen-powered bulk carriers.With the latest award, LH2 Shipping is now involved in the development of six hydrogen-powered bulk carrier projects.

top_signals.title: War bonds to lift defence spending ruled out
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer has ruled out issuing defence bonds to fund an uplift in spending as a spokesperson said it was “just another form of borrowing”.  In his absence at Prime Minister’s Questions, Starmer’s deputy David Lammy appeared to open the door to defence bonds being created to fund a rise in spending.  The Liberal [...]

top_signals.title: Haaland’s World Cup Debut Draws Sponsors Betting on US Stardom
top_signals.summary: Last week, Erling Haaland sat with fans and watched the NHL’s Carolina Hurricanes close in on the Stanley Cup. One of the world’s best football players is unlikely to get away with such anonymity for much longer.

top_signals.title: Size matters: KNDS pitches long-barreled artillery for 60-kilometer base range
top_signals.summary: The 155mm howitzer is equipped with a girthy 58 caliber gun tube, about 12% longer than the 52 caliber barrels common in Europe.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
